creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

To submitter:  Could you please provide a dmesg and the output 
of "pciconf -lv" for this system?  Also, did the machine work 
work with 7.0-RELEASE, or was the upgrade to -STABLE needed? 
Lastly, can you confirm the on-board NICs work well, and also 
do you know if the on-board RAID and video work?  Thanks!
